title: Spring Boot E-commerce API
excerpt: API E-commerce lengkap dan terintegrasi yang dibangun dengan Java 21, Spring Boot, Spring Security & JWT, PostgreSQL, dan didokumentasikan menggunakan Swagger OpenAPI.

This allows the system to be ",n(i.strong,{children:"scalable"})," as the number of users, products, and transactions grows significantly."]}),"
",a(i.p,{children:["All critical data—from user details and product catalogs to transaction records—is stored consistently in a database, making this platform a ",n(i.strong,{children:"reliable, secure, and production-ready"})," foundation for modern e-commerce applications."]}),"

"]}),"

"]}),"

title: Distributed Modular Microservice E-Commerce Platform
excerpt: Backend e-commerce berskala produksi berbasis modular-microservice yang dibangun dengan Go, gRPC, PostgreSQL, Kafka, dan Kubernetes, dilengkapi tumpukan observabilitas penuh.
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:l}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(a){const r={a:"a",code:"code",em:"em",figure:"figure",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",hr:"hr",li:"li",p:"p",pre:"pre",span:"span",strong:"strong",table:"table",tbody:"tbody",td:"td",th:"th",thead:"thead",tr:"tr",ul:"ul",...a.components};return l(e,{children:[n(r.h1,{id:"distributed-modular-microservice-e-commerce-platform",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#distributed-modular-microservice-e-commerce-platform",children:"Distributed Modular Microservice E-Commerce Platform"})})," ",l(r.p,{children:["A production-grade, highly resilient, and fully observable ",n(r.strong,{children:"microservices e-commerce backend"})," built in ",n(r.strong,{children:"Go (Golang)"}),". Designed around domain-driven service boundaries following Clean Architecture principles, it distributes transactional workloads across self-contained, micro-deployable services while maintaining high consistency and performance."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["Each e-commerce and identity business domain — Users, Roles, Cards, Merchants, Saldo, Topups, Transactions, Transfers, Withdrawals — lives in its own self-contained microservice. These services communicate synchronously via lightweight ",n(r.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," protocols and asynchronously using ",n(r.strong,{children:"Apache Kafka"})," event propagation, exposing a unified entry point through a ",n(r.strong,{children:"REST API Gateway"})," built with ",n(r.strong,{children:"Echo"})," and NGINX."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["For high-performance analytical queries and business intelligence, the platform features a ",n(r.strong,{children:"CQRS-style OLAP & Analytics Layer"})," powered by ",n(r.strong,{children:"ClickHouse"}),". Real-time events from Kafka are consumed by ",n(r.strong,{children:"Stats Writer"}),", which processes and writes them to ClickHouse, while the ",n(r.strong,{children:"Stats Reader"})," gRPC service provides ultra-fast aggregations (monthly/yearly volumes, payment methods, transaction statuses) back to the REST API Gateway."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform is fortified with a ",n(r.strong,{children:"comprehensive observability suite"})," (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Jaeger, OpenTelemetry, Pyroscope), robust connection pooling via ",n(r.strong,{children:"PgBouncer"}),", ",n(r.strong,{children:"isolated Redis caching"})," with custom telemetry for each service, and Kubernetes configurations ready for production auto-scaling."]})," ",n(r.hr,{})," ",n(r.h2,{id:"key-features",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#key-features",children:"Key Features"})})," ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform implements a ",n(r.strong,{children:"Distributed Microservices Architecture"}),". Each business service is logical, decoupled, and self-contained inside the ",n(r.code,{children:"service/"})," directory, possessing its own independent gRPC boundary. An ",n(r.strong,{children:"API Gateway"})," (Echo + NGINX) acts as the unified edge router, routing and translating client REST HTTP requests into fast gRPC downstream communications."]})," ",n(r.h3,{id:"core-architecture-principles",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#core-architecture-principles",children:"Core Architecture Principles"})})," ",l(r.ul,{children:[" ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Domain-Driven Boundary Isolation"}),": Every service owns its database access, caching layers, and service logic, strictly forbidding cross-boundary database sharing."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Clean Architecture"}),": Standardized layers of ",n(r.code,{children:"handler → service → repository"})," ensure that business domains remain unaffected by framework or database changes."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"PgBouncer Pooling"}),": Employs connection pooling to avoid PostgreSQL socket exhaustion across the multiple concurrent microservices."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"OLAP & CQRS Pattern"}),": Transactional (OLTP) writes are processed in PostgreSQL, while analytical (OLAP) read queries are redirected to a dedicated ClickHouse database populated asynchronously via Kafka events."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Event-Driven Resilience"}),": Apache Kafka decouples transaction events, ensuring side effects like email billing and stats writing remain completely non-blocking."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"OTel Telemetry Integration"}),": Standardized OpenTelemetry middleware injects trace IDs across gRPC boundaries, allowing seamless trace propagation from the client REST HTTP edge down to postgres and ClickHouse operations."]})," "]})," title: Distributed Modular Microservice Payment Gateway
excerpt: Decentralized financial orchestration platform optimized for extreme reliability, horizontal scalability, and real-time observability with AI security and ClickHouse analytics.
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:l}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(a){const r={a:"a",code:"code",em:"em",figure:"figure",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",hr:"hr",li:"li",p:"p",pre:"pre",span:"span",strong:"strong",table:"table",tbody:"tbody",td:"td",th:"th",thead:"thead",tr:"tr",ul:"ul",...a.components};return l(e,{children:[n(r.h1,{id:"distributed-microservice-payment-gateway-grpc",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#distributed-microservice-payment-gateway-grpc",children:"Distributed Microservice Payment Gateway (gRPC)"})})," ",l(r.p,{children:["A production-grade, highly resilient, and fully observable ",n(r.strong,{children:"microservices payment gateway backend"})," built in ",n(r.strong,{children:"Go (Golang)"}),". Designed around domain-driven service boundaries following Clean Architecture principles, it distributes financial workloads across self-contained, micro-deployable services while maintaining high consistency and performance."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["Each financial and identity business domain — Users, Roles, Cards, Merchants, Saldo, Topups, Transactions, Transfers, Withdrawals — lives in its own self-contained microservice. These services communicate synchronously via lightweight ",n(r.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," protocols and asynchronously using ",n(r.strong,{children:"Apache Kafka"})," event propagation, exposing a unified entry point through a ",n(r.strong,{children:"REST API Gateway"})," built with ",n(r.strong,{children:"Echo"})," and NGINX."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["For high-performance analytical queries and business intelligence, the platform features a ",n(r.strong,{children:"CQRS-style OLAP & Analytics Layer"})," powered by ",n(r.strong,{children:"ClickHouse"}),". Real-time events from Kafka are consumed by ",n(r.strong,{children:"Stats Writer"}),", which processes and writes them to ClickHouse, while the ",n(r.strong,{children:"Stats Reader"})," gRPC service provides ultra-fast aggregations (monthly/yearly volumes, payment methods, transaction statuses) back to the REST API Gateway."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform is fortified with a ",n(r.strong,{children:"comprehensive observability suite"})," (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Jaeger, OpenTelemetry, Pyroscope), robust connection pooling via ",n(r.strong,{children:"PgBouncer"}),", ",n(r.strong,{children:"isolated Redis caching"})," with custom telemetry for each service, and Kubernetes configurations ready for production auto-scaling."]})," ",n(r.hr,{})," ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform implements a ",n(r.strong,{children:"Distributed Microservices Architecture"}),". Each business service is logical, decoupled, and self-contained inside the ",n(r.code,{children:"service/"})," directory, possessing its own independent gRPC boundary. An ",n(r.strong,{children:"API Gateway"})," (Echo + NGINX) acts as the unified edge router, routing and translating client REST HTTP requests into fast gRPC downstream communications."]})," ",n(r.h3,{id:"core-architecture-principles",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#core-architecture-principles",children:"Core Architecture Principles"})})," ",l(r.ul,{children:[" ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Domain-Driven Boundary Isolation"}),": Every service owns its database access, caching layers, and service logic, strictly forbidding cross-boundary database sharing."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Clean Architecture"}),": Standardized layers of ",n(r.code,{children:"handler → service → repository"})," ensure that business domains remain unaffected by framework or database changes."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"PgBouncer Pooling"}),": Employs connection pooling to avoid PostgreSQL socket exhaustion across the multiple concurrent microservices."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"OLAP & CQRS Pattern"}),": Transactional (OLTP) writes are processed in PostgreSQL, while analytical (OLAP) read queries are redirected to a dedicated ClickHouse database populated asynchronously via Kafka events."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Event-Driven Resilience"}),": Apache Kafka decouples transaction events, ensuring side effects like email billing and stats writing remain completely non-blocking."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"OTel Telemetry Integration"}),": Standardized OpenTelemetry middleware injects trace IDs across gRPC boundaries, allowing seamless trace propagation from the client REST HTTP edge down to postgres and ClickHouse operations."]})," "]})," title: Distributed Microservice Simple E-commerce
excerpt: A distributed microservice e-commerce platform built with Rust, gRPC, PostgreSQL, Kafka, and a full observability stack.

",n(a.p,{children:"This project is a comprehensive e-commerce application built with a microservices architecture using Rust. ",n(a.h2,{id:"architecture-overview",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#architecture-overview",children:"Architecture Overview"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"The system is designed around a distributed architecture where each business domain is isolated into its own microservice."}),"

title: Distributed Modular Monolith E-commerce Go
excerpt: A Distributed Modular Monolith E-commerce Platform built with Go, gRPC, PostgreSQL, and Kafka with full observability stack.
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:a}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(r){const l={a:"a",code:"code",figure:"figure",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",h4:"h4",hr:"hr",li:"li",p:"p",pre:"pre",span:"span",strong:"strong",table:"table",tbody:"tbody",td:"td",th:"th",thead:"thead",tr:"tr",ul:"ul",...r.components};return a(e,{children:[n(l.h1,{id:"distributed-modular-monolith-e-commerce-platform",children:n(l.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#distributed-modular-monolith-e-commerce-platform",children:"Distributed Modular Monolith E-commerce Platform"})})," ",a(l.p,{children:["A production-grade, ",n(l.strong,{children:"modular-monolith e-commerce backend"})," built with ",n(l.strong,{children:"Go (Golang)"}),", designed around domain-driven service boundaries while retaining the operational simplicity of a single deployment unit. Each business domain — Users, Merchants, Products, Orders, Transactions, Reviews — lives in its own self-contained module with a clean internal architecture, yet all modules ship as independently deployable containers that communicate via ",n(l.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," and asynchronous ",n(l.strong,{children:"Kafka"})," events."]})," ",a(l.p,{children:["The platform ships with a ",n(l.strong,{children:"full observability stack"})," (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Jaeger, OpenTelemetry), ",n(l.strong,{children:"Redis caching"})," with instrumented metrics, title: Distributed Modular Monolith E-commerce Go - GraphQL
excerpt: Implementasi backend aman, modular, dan scalable menggunakan GraphQL API Gateway, gRPC, Go, Kafka, dan PostgreSQL.

title: Distributed Modular Monolith Payment Gateway - GraphQL
excerpt: Implementasi backend aman, modular, dan scalable menggunakan GraphQL API Gateway, gRPC, Go, Kafka, dan PostgreSQL.

title: Distributed Modular Monolith Point of Sale - GraphQL
excerpt: Implementasi backend aman, modular, dan scalable menggunakan GraphQL API Gateway, gRPC, Go, Kafka, dan PostgreSQL.

title: Distributed Modular Monolith Payment Gateway Go
excerpt: A Distributed Modular Monolith Payment Gateway built with Go, gRPC, PostgreSQL, and Kafka with full observability stack.
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:l}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(a){const r={a:"a",code:"code",em:"em",figure:"figure",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",h4:"h4",hr:"hr",li:"li",p:"p",pre:"pre",span:"span",strong:"strong",table:"table",tbody:"tbody",td:"td",th:"th",thead:"thead",tr:"tr",ul:"ul",...a.components};return l(e,{children:[n(r.h1,{id:"distributed-modular-monolith-payment-gateway",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#distributed-modular-monolith-payment-gateway",children:"Distributed Modular Monolith Payment Gateway"})})," ",l(r.p,{children:["A production-grade, highly resilient, and fully observable ",n(r.strong,{children:"modular-monolith payment gateway backend"})," built in ",n(r.strong,{children:"Go (Golang)"}),". Designed around domain-driven service boundaries following Clean Architecture principles, it retains the operational and deployment simplicity of a single deployment unit while maintaining logical isolation typical of microservices."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["Each financial and identity business domain — Users, Roles, Cards, Merchants, Saldo, Topups, Transactions, Transfers, Withdrawals — lives in its own self-contained module. These modules communicate synchronously via lightweight ",n(r.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," protocols and asynchronously using ",n(r.strong,{children:"Apache Kafka"})," event propagation, exposing a unified entry point through a ",n(r.strong,{children:"REST API Gateway"})," built with ",n(r.strong,{children:"Echo"})," and NGINX."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform is fortified with a ",n(r.strong,{children:"comprehensive observability suite"})," (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Jaeger, OpenTelemetry, Pyroscope), robust connection pooling via ",n(r.strong,{children:"PgBouncer"}),", ",n(r.strong,{children:"isolated Redis caching"})," with custom telemetry for each service, and Kubernetes configurations ready for production auto-scaling."]})," ",n(r.hr,{})," ",n(r.h2,{id:"key-features",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#key-features",children:"Key Features"})})," & Users"})}),l(r.td,{style:{textAlign:"left"},children:["Secure registration, multi-factor login, stateless JWT access/refresh token lifecycle, password reset workflows, OTP email verification, and ",n(r.code,{children:"GetMe"})," profile resolver."]})]}),l(r.tr,{children:[n(r.td,{style:{textAlign:"left"},children:n(r.strong,{children:"Roles & RBAC"})}),n(r.td,{style:{textAlign:"left"},children:"Custom permission configuration, granular access control matrices, and sub-second permission evaluation cached via Redis."})]}),l(r.tr,{children:[n(r.td,{style:{textAlign:"left"},children:n(r.strong,{children:"Cards & VCC"})}),n(r.td,{style:{textAlign:"left"},children:"Virtual and debit card CRUD operations with soft-delete capabilities, card activation/suspension toggles, and multi-dimensional transaction analytics (daily/monthly/yearly topup, withdraw, transfer)."})]}),l(r.tr,{children:[n(r.td,{style:{textAlign:"left"},children:n(r.strong,{children:"Merchants"})}),n(r.td,{style:{textAlign:"left"},children:"Fully featured merchant onboarding, profile balances."})]}),l(r.tr,{children:[n(r.td,{style:{textAlign:"left"},children:n(r.strong,{children:"Topup"})}),n(r.td,{style:{textAlign:"left"},children:"Balance loading ledger engine supporting multiple payment methods, detailed transactions logging, and soft-delete audit records."})]}),l(r.tr,{children:[n(r.td,{style:{textAlign:"left"},children:n(r.strong,{children:"Transaction"})}),n(r.td,{style:{textAlign:"left"},children:"Centralized financial audit ledger collecting transaction events across the system, global search filters, status tracking, and monthly/yearly volume reports."})]}),l(r.tr,{children:[n(r.td,{style:{textAlign:"left"},children:n(r.strong,{children:"Transfer"})}),n(r.td,{style:{textAlign:"left"},children:"Safe peer-to-peer card-to-card or user-to-user logging."})]}),l(r.tr,{children:[n(r.td,{style:{textAlign:"left"},children:n(r.strong,{children:"Withdraw"})}),n(r.td,{style:{textAlign:"left"},children:"Funds settlement from user cards to external Worker"})}),n(r.td,{style:{textAlign:"left"},children:"Kafka-driven asynchronous worker dispatching critical notification emails (OTPs, login alerts, merchant onboarding notices, and transfer/topup invoices) via SMTP."})]}),l(r.tr,{children:[n(r.td,{style:{textAlign:"left"},children:n(r.strong,{children:"Observability"})}),n(r.td,{style:{textAlign:"left"},children:"Multi-dimensional metrics (Prometheus + Grafana), log aggregation (Loki + Promtail), end-to-end distributed tracing (Jaeger + OpenTelemetry), continuous CPU/Memory profiling (Pyroscope), and resource monitors (Node, Kafka, Postgres Exporters)."})]}),l(r.tr,{children:[n(r.td,{style:{textAlign:"left"},children:n(r.strong,{children:"Deployment"})}),n(r.td,{style:{textAlign:"left"},children:"Local orchestration using Docker Compose (featuring individual Redis instances and PgBouncer), and auto-scaling Kubernetes manifests configured with Horizontal Pod Autoscalers (HPA)."})]})]})]})," ",n(r.hr,{})," ",n(r.h2,{id:"architecture-overview",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#architecture-overview",children:"Architecture Overview"})})," ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform implements a ",n(r.strong,{children:"Distributed Modular Monolith"})," architecture. Each business service is logical, decoupled, and self-contained inside the ",n(r.code,{children:"service/"})," directory, possessing its own independent gRPC boundary. An ",n(r.strong,{children:"API Gateway"})," (Echo + NGINX) acts as the unified edge router, routing and translating client REST HTTP requests into fast gRPC downstream communications."]})," ",n(r.h3,{id:"core-architecture-principles",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#core-architecture-principles",children:"Core Architecture Principles"})})," ",l(r.ul,{children:[" ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Domain-Driven Boundary Isolation"}),": Every service owns its database access, caching layers, and service logic, strictly forbidding cross-boundary database sharing."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Clean Architecture"}),": Standardized layers of ",n(r.code,{children:"handler → service → repository"})," ensure that business domains remain unaffected by framework or database changes."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"PgBouncer Pooling"}),": Employs connection pooling to avoid PostgreSQL socket exhaustion across the multiple concurrent modular services."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Event-Driven Resilience"}),": Apache Kafka decouples transaction events, ensuring side effects like email billing remain completely non-blocking."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"OTel Telemetry Integration"}),": Standardized OpenTelemetry middleware injects trace IDs across gRPC boundaries, allowing seamless trace propagation from the client REST HTTP edge down to postgres operations."]})," "]})," title: Distributed Modular Monolith Payment Gateway Rust
excerpt: A Distributed Modular Monolith Payment Gateway Platform built with Rust, gRPC, PostgreSQL

const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:r}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(i){const l={a:"a",code:"code",figure:"figure",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",hr:"hr",img:"img",li:"li",ol:"ol",p:"p",pre:"pre",span:"span",strong:"strong",table:"table",tbody:"tbody",td:"td",th:"th",thead:"thead",tr:"tr",ul:"ul",...i.components};return r(e,{children:[n(l.h1,{id:"distributed-modular-monolith-payment-gateway-in-rust",children:n(l.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#distributed-modular-monolith-payment-gateway-in-rust",children:"Distributed Modular Monolith Payment Gateway in Rust"})}),"
",n(l.p,{children:"A production-ready payment gateway platform implementing a modular monolith architecture, built with Rust, gRPC, PostgreSQL, and React."}),"
",n(l.p,{children:n(l.img,{src:"/portofolio/distributed-modular-monolith-paymentgateway-rust_1.png",alt:"Payment Gateway Dashboard"})}),"

",n(l.p,{children:"This project demonstrates a comprehensive payment gateway system designed to simulate digital financial transactions. Built with a modular monolith architecture, the system separates business domains (users, balances, transactions) into independent modules within a single codebase. Inter-module communication is efficiently handled through gRPC."}),"
",n(l.p,{children:"The primary goal is to provide a real-world example of modern architecture implementation in the Rust ecosystem, complete with a backend, frontend dashboard, and desktop application version."}),"

",r(l.ul,{children:["
",r(l.li,{children:[n(l.strong,{children:"User Management & JWT Authentication"}),": Secure registration, login, and session management"]}),"
",r(l.li,{children:[n(l.strong,{children:"Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)"}),": Feature access restriction based on user roles"]}),"
",r(l.li,{children:[n(l.strong,{children:"Digital Wallet Management"}),": Balance top-up and utilization for transactions"]}),"
",r(l.li,{children:[n(l.strong,{children:"Financial Transactions"}),":","
",r(l.ul,{children:["
",n(l.li,{children:"Top-up from external sources"}),"
",n(l.li,{children:"Peer-to-peer transfers"}),"
",n(l.li,{children:"Withdrawal to external accounts"}),"

",r(l.li,{children:[n(l.strong,{children:"Payment Card Management"}),": Users can link and manage payment cards"]}),"
",r(l.li,{children:[n(l.strong,{children:"Administrative Dashboard"}),": Interface for monitoring and managing system activities"]}),"
",r(l.li,{children:[n(l.strong,{children:"Inter-Service Communication"}),": Efficient, type-safe communication via gRPC"]}),"

This design provides clear separation of concerns while simplifying deployment and development compared to a full microservices architecture."}),"

title: Distributed Modular Monolith Point Of Sale Go
excerpt: A Distributed Modular Monolith Point Of Sale built with Go, gRPC, PostgreSQL, and Kafka with full observability stack.

title: Distributed Modular Monolith Ecommerce Quarkus - GraphQL
excerpt: Implementasi backend aman, modular, dan scalable menggunakan GraphQL Gateway, gRPC, Quarkus, Kafka, dan PostgreSQL.

Designed around domain-driven service boundaries following Clean Architecture and CQRS principles, it retains the operational and deployment simplicity of a single deployment unit while maintaining logical isolation typical of microservices."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["Each e-commerce business domain — Users, Roles, Auth, Products, Categories, Cart, Orders, Shipping, Merchants, Reviews, Transactions, Banners, Sliders — lives in its own self-contained Maven module. These modules communicate synchronously via high-performance ",n(r.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," protocols and asynchronously using ",n(r.strong,{children:"Apache Kafka"})," event propagation, exposing a unified reactive entry point through a ",n(r.strong,{children:"GraphQL API Gateway"})," powered by Quarkus SmallRye GraphQL."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform is fortified with a ",n(r.strong,{children:"comprehensive observability suite"})," (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Jaeger, OpenTelemetry), robust connection pooling via ",n(r.strong,{children:"PgBouncer"}),", ",n(r.strong,{children:"distributed Redis Cluster caching"})," with custom telemetry for each service, and Kubernetes configurations ready for production auto-scaling."]})," ",n(r.hr,{})," ",n(r.h2,{id:"architecture-overview",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#architecture-overview",children:"Architecture Overview"})})," ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform implements a ",n(r.strong,{children:"Distributed Modular Monolith"})," architecture. Each business service is logical, decoupled, and self-contained inside its own Maven submodule, possessing its own independent gRPC boundary. A ",n(r.strong,{children:"Quarkus GraphQL API Gateway"})," acts as the unified edge router, transforming client GraphQL queries and mutations into fast gRPC downstream communications via Quarkus gRPC clients."]})," ",n(r.h3,{id:"core-architecture-principles",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#core-architecture-principles",children:"Core Architecture Principles"})})," ",l(r.ul,{children:[" ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Domain-Driven Boundary Isolation"}),": Every service owns its database access, caching layers, and service logic, strictly forbidding cross-boundary database sharing."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Clean Architecture & CQRS"}),": Separation of concerns using ",n(r.code,{children:"Handler (gRPC) → Service (Command/Query) → Repository (Command/Query)"})," layers ensures business logic remains clean, performant, and framework-agnostic."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Reactive execution"}),": Powered entirely by Quarkus reactive engine and Mutiny, enabling high throughput with minimal resource footprints."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"PgBouncer Pooling"}),": Employs connection pooling to avoid PostgreSQL socket exhaustion across the multiple concurrent modular services."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Event-Driven Resilience"}),": Apache Kafka decouples transaction events, ensuring side effects like email billing remain completely non-blocking."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"OTel Telemetry Integration"}),": Standardized OpenTelemetry middleware injects trace IDs across gRPC boundaries, allowing seamless trace propagation from the client GraphQL gateway down to postgres operations."]})," title: Distributed Modular Monolith E-Commerce Quarkus
excerpt: Implementasi backend aman, modular, dan scalable menggunakan REST API Gateway, gRPC, Quarkus, Kafka, dan PostgreSQL.

Designed around domain-driven service boundaries following Clean Architecture and CQRS principles, it retains the operational and deployment simplicity of a single deployment unit while maintaining logical isolation typical of microservices."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["Each e-commerce business domain — Users, Roles, Auth, Products, Categories, Cart, Orders, Shipping, Merchants, Reviews, Transactions, Banners, Sliders — lives in its own self-contained Maven module. These modules communicate synchronously via high-performance ",n(r.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," protocols and asynchronously using ",n(r.strong,{children:"Apache Kafka"})," event propagation, exposing a unified reactive entry point through a ",n(r.strong,{children:"REST API Gateway"})," powered by Quarkus RESTEasy Reactive."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform is fortified with a ",n(r.strong,{children:"comprehensive observability suite"})," (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Jaeger, OpenTelemetry), robust connection pooling via ",n(r.strong,{children:"PgBouncer"}),", ",n(r.strong,{children:"distributed Redis Cluster caching"})," with custom telemetry for each service, and Kubernetes configurations ready for production auto-scaling."]})," ",n(r.hr,{})," ",n(r.h2,{id:"key-features",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#key-features",children:"Key Features"})})," (featuring a 6-node Redis Cluster and PgBouncer), and auto-scaling Kubernetes manifests configured with Horizontal Pod Autoscalers (HPA)."})]})]})]})," ",n(r.hr,{})," ",n(r.h2,{id:"architecture-overview",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#architecture-overview",children:"Architecture Overview"})})," ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform implements a ",n(r.strong,{children:"Distributed Modular Monolith"})," architecture. Each business service is logical, decoupled, and self-contained inside its own Maven submodule, possessing its own independent gRPC boundary. A ",n(r.strong,{children:"Quarkus REST API Gateway"})," acts as the unified edge router, transforming client HTTP REST requests into fast gRPC downstream communications via Quarkus gRPC clients."]})," ",n(r.h3,{id:"core-architecture-principles",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#core-architecture-principles",children:"Core Architecture Principles"})})," ",l(r.ul,{children:[" ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Domain-Driven Boundary Isolation"}),": Every service owns its database access, caching layers, and service logic, strictly forbidding cross-boundary database sharing."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Clean Architecture & CQRS"}),": Separation of concerns using ",n(r.code,{children:"Handler (gRPC) → Service (Command/Query) → Repository (Command/Query)"})," layers ensures business logic remains clean, performant, and framework-agnostic."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Reactive execution"}),": Powered entirely by Quarkus reactive engine and Mutiny, enabling high throughput with minimal resource footprints."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"PgBouncer Pooling"}),": Employs connection pooling to avoid PostgreSQL socket exhaustion across the multiple concurrent modular services."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Event-Driven Resilience"}),": Apache Kafka decouples transaction events, ensuring side effects like email billing remain completely non-blocking."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"OTel Telemetry Integration"}),": Standardized OpenTelemetry middleware injects trace IDs across gRPC boundaries, allowing seamless trace propagation from the client REST gateway down to postgres operations."]})," "]})," title: Distributed Modular Monolith Payment Gateway Quarkus - GraphQL
excerpt: Implementasi backend aman, modular, dan scalable menggunakan GraphQL Gateway, gRPC, Quarkus, Kafka, dan PostgreSQL.

Designed around domain-driven service boundaries following Clean Architecture and CQRS principles, it retains the operational and deployment simplicity of a single deployment unit while maintaining logical isolation typical of microservices."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["Each financial and identity business domain — Users, Roles, Cards, Merchants, Saldo, Topups, Transactions, Transfers, Withdrawals — lives in its own self-contained Maven module. These modules communicate synchronously via high-performance ",n(r.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," protocols and asynchronously using ",n(r.strong,{children:"Apache Kafka"})," event propagation, exposing a unified reactive entry point through a ",n(r.strong,{children:"GraphQL API Gateway"})," powered by Quarkus SmallRye GraphQL."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform is fortified with a ",n(r.strong,{children:"comprehensive observability suite"})," (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Jaeger, OpenTelemetry), robust connection pooling via ",n(r.strong,{children:"PgBouncer"}),", ",n(r.strong,{children:"distributed Redis Cluster caching"})," with custom telemetry for each service, and Kubernetes configurations ready for production auto-scaling."]})," ",n(r.hr,{})," ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform implements a ",n(r.strong,{children:"Distributed Modular Monolith"})," architecture. Each business service is logical, decoupled, and self-contained inside its own Maven submodule, possessing its own independent gRPC boundary. title: Distributed Modular Monolith Payment Gateway Quarkus
excerpt: Implementasi backend aman, modular, dan scalable menggunakan REST API Gateway, gRPC, Quarkus, Kafka, dan PostgreSQL.

Designed around domain-driven service boundaries following Clean Architecture and CQRS principles, it retains the operational and deployment simplicity of a single deployment unit while maintaining logical isolation typical of microservices."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["Each financial and identity business domain — Users, Roles, Cards, Merchants, Saldo, Topups, Transactions, Transfers, Withdrawals — lives in its own self-contained Maven module. These modules communicate synchronously via high-performance ",n(r.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," protocols and asynchronously using ",n(r.strong,{children:"Apache Kafka"})," event propagation, exposing a unified reactive entry point through a ",n(r.strong,{children:"REST API Gateway"})," powered by Quarkus RESTEasy Reactive."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform is fortified with a ",n(r.strong,{children:"comprehensive observability suite"})," (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Jaeger, OpenTelemetry), robust connection pooling via ",n(r.strong,{children:"PgBouncer"}),", ",n(r.strong,{children:"distributed Redis Cluster caching"})," with custom telemetry for each service, and Kubernetes configurations ready for production auto-scaling."]})," ",n(r.hr,{})," ",n(r.h2,{id:"key-features",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#key-features",children:"Key Features"})})," (featuring a 6-node Redis Cluster and PgBouncer), and auto-scaling Kubernetes manifests configured with Horizontal Pod Autoscalers (HPA)."})]})]})]})," ",n(r.hr,{})," ",n(r.h2,{id:"architecture-overview",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#architecture-overview",children:"Architecture Overview"})})," ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform implements a ",n(r.strong,{children:"Distributed Modular Monolith"})," architecture. Each business service is logical, decoupled, and self-contained inside its own Maven submodule, possessing its own independent gRPC boundary. A ",n(r.strong,{children:"Quarkus REST API Gateway"})," acts as the unified edge router, transforming client HTTP REST requests into fast gRPC downstream communications via Quarkus gRPC clients."]})," ",n(r.h3,{id:"core-architecture-principles",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#core-architecture-principles",children:"Core Architecture Principles"})})," ",l(r.ul,{children:[" ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Domain-Driven Boundary Isolation"}),": Every service owns its database access, caching layers, and service logic, strictly forbidding cross-boundary database sharing."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Clean Architecture & CQRS"}),": Separation of concerns using ",n(r.code,{children:"Handler (gRPC) → Service (Command/Query) → Repository (Command/Query)"})," layers ensures business logic remains clean, performant, and framework-agnostic."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Reactive execution"}),": Powered entirely by Quarkus reactive engine and Mutiny, enabling high throughput with minimal resource footprints."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"PgBouncer Pooling"}),": Employs connection pooling to avoid PostgreSQL socket exhaustion across the multiple concurrent modular services."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Event-Driven Resilience"}),": Apache Kafka decouples transaction events, ensuring side effects like email billing remain completely non-blocking."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"OTel Telemetry Integration"}),": Standardized OpenTelemetry middleware injects trace IDs across gRPC boundaries, allowing seamless trace propagation from the client REST gateway down to postgres operations."]})," "]})," title: Distributed Modular Monolith Point of Sale Quarkus - GraphQL
excerpt: Implementasi backend aman, modular, dan scalable menggunakan GraphQL Gateway, gRPC, Quarkus, Kafka, dan PostgreSQL.

Designed around domain-driven service boundaries following Clean Architecture and CQRS principles, it retains the operational and deployment simplicity of a single deployment unit while maintaining logical isolation typical of microservices."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["Each financial and identity business domain — Users, Roles, Cards, Merchants, Saldo, Topups, Transactions, Transfers, Withdrawals — lives in its own self-contained Maven module. These modules communicate synchronously via high-performance ",n(r.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," protocols and asynchronously using ",n(r.strong,{children:"Apache Kafka"})," event propagation, exposing a unified reactive entry point through a ",n(r.strong,{children:"REST API Gateway"})," powered by Quarkus RESTEasy Reactive."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform is fortified with a ",n(r.strong,{children:"comprehensive observability suite"})," (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Jaeger, OpenTelemetry), robust connection pooling via ",n(r.strong,{children:"PgBouncer"}),", ",n(r.strong,{children:"distributed Redis Cluster caching"})," with custom telemetry for each service, and Kubernetes configurations ready for production auto-scaling."]})," ",n(r.hr,{})," ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform implements a ",n(r.strong,{children:"Distributed Modular Monolith"})," architecture. Each business service is logical, decoupled, and self-contained inside its own Maven submodule, possessing its own independent gRPC boundary. A ",n(r.strong,{children:"Quarkus REST API Gateway"})," acts as the unified edge router, transforming client HTTP REST requests into fast gRPC downstream communications via Quarkus gRPC clients."]})," ",n(r.h3,{id:"core-architecture-principles",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#core-architecture-principles",children:"Core Architecture Principles"})})," ",l(r.ul,{children:[" ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Domain-Driven Boundary Isolation"}),": Every service owns its database access, caching layers, and service logic, strictly forbidding cross-boundary database sharing."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Clean Architecture & CQRS"}),": Separation of concerns using ",n(r.code,{children:"Handler (gRPC) → Service (Command/Query) → Repository (Command/Query)"})," layers ensures business logic remains clean, performant, and framework-agnostic."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Reactive execution"}),": Powered entirely by Quarkus reactive engine and Mutiny, enabling high throughput with minimal resource footprints."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"PgBouncer Pooling"}),": Employs connection pooling to avoid PostgreSQL socket exhaustion across the multiple concurrent modular services."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Event-Driven Resilience"}),": Apache Kafka decouples transaction events, ensuring side effects like email billing remain completely non-blocking."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"OTel Telemetry Integration"}),": Standardized OpenTelemetry middleware injects trace IDs across gRPC boundaries, allowing seamless trace propagation from the client REST gateway down to postgres operations."]})," "]})," title: Distributed Modular Monolith Point of Sale Quarkus
excerpt: Implementasi backend aman, modular, dan scalable menggunakan REST API Gateway, gRPC, Quarkus, Kafka, dan PostgreSQL.

Designed around domain-driven service boundaries following Clean Architecture and CQRS principles, it retains the operational and deployment simplicity of a single deployment unit while maintaining logical isolation typical of microservices."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["Each retail and identity business domain — Users, Roles, Cashiers, Merchants, Categories, Products, Orders, Order Items, Transactions — lives in its own self-contained Maven module. These modules communicate synchronously via high-performance ",n(r.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," protocols and asynchronously using ",n(r.strong,{children:"Apache Kafka"})," event propagation, exposing a unified reactive entry point through a ",n(r.strong,{children:"REST API Gateway"})," powered by Quarkus RESTEasy Reactive."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform is fortified with a ",n(r.strong,{children:"comprehensive observability suite"})," (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Jaeger, OpenTelemetry), robust connection pooling via ",n(r.strong,{children:"PgBouncer"}),", ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform implements a ",n(r.strong,{children:"Distributed Modular Monolith"})," architecture. Each business service is logical, decoupled, and self-contained inside its own Maven submodule, possessing its own independent gRPC boundary. A ",n(r.strong,{children:"Quarkus REST API Gateway"})," acts as the unified edge router, transforming client HTTP REST requests into fast gRPC downstream communications via Quarkus gRPC clients."]})," ",n(r.h3,{id:"core-architecture-principles",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#core-architecture-principles",children:"Core Architecture Principles"})})," ",l(r.ul,{children:[" ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Domain-Driven Boundary Isolation"}),": Every service owns its database access, caching layers, and service logic, strictly forbidding cross-boundary database sharing."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Clean Architecture & CQRS"}),": Separation of concerns using ",n(r.code,{children:"Handler (gRPC) → Service (Command/Query) → Repository (Command/Query)"})," layers ensures business logic remains clean, performant, and framework-agnostic."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Reactive execution"}),": Powered entirely by Quarkus reactive engine and Mutiny, enabling high throughput with minimal resource footprints."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"PgBouncer Pooling"}),": Employs connection pooling to avoid PostgreSQL socket exhaustion across the multiple concurrent modular services."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Event-Driven Resilience"}),": Apache Kafka decouples transaction events, ensuring side effects like email billing remain completely non-blocking."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"OTel Telemetry Integration"}),": Standardized OpenTelemetry middleware injects trace IDs across gRPC boundaries, allowing seamless trace propagation from the client REST gateway down to postgres operations."]})," "]})," title: Distributed Modular Monolith – Simple E-commerce
excerpt: A Distributed Modular Monolith – Simple E-commerce with Rust, gRPC, PostgreSQL, and with full observability stack.

",a(r.p,{children:["Artinya, semua layanan dikelola dalam satu ",n(r.strong,{children:"monorepo"}),", tapi dipisahkan dalam bentuk modul/layanan independen (",n(r.code,{children:"auth"}),", ",n(r.code,{children:"user"}),", ",n(r.code,{children:"role"}),", ",n(r.code,{children:"product"}),", ",n(r.code,{children:"order"}),", ",n(r.code,{children:"email"}),") yang berkomunikasi lewat gRPC. title: Example Sea Query Tonic Payment Gateway
excerpt: A monorepo payment gateway built with Rust, gRPC, PostgreSQL, and with full observability stack.

toc.title: Example Sea Query Tonic Payment Gateway

body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:a}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(i){const r={a:"a",code:"code",em:"em",figure:"figure",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",h4:"h4",hr:"hr",img:"img",li:"li",ol:"ol",p:"p",pre:"pre",span:"span",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...i.components};return a(e,{children:[n(r.h2,{id:"example-sea-query-tonic-payment-gateway",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#example-sea-query-tonic-payment-gateway",children:"Example Sea Query Tonic Payment Gateway"})}),"
",a(r.p,{children:["Proyek ini adalah contoh implementasi ",n(r.strong,{children:"sistem payment gateway sederhana"})," yang dibangun dengan bahasa pemrograman ",n(r.strong,{children:"Rust"}),". Tujuan utama proyek ini adalah memberikan gambaran bagaimana merancang layanan finansial dengan pendekatan ",n(r.strong,{children:"service-oriented"}),", komunikasi efisien via ",n(r.strong,{children:"gRPC"}),", serta mendukung ",n(r.strong,{children:"observability"})," sejak awal."]}),"
",n(r.hr,{}),"
",n(r.h2,{id:"-fitur-utama",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#-fitur-utama",children:"⚡ Fitur Utama"})}),"
",n(r.h3,{id:"-1-manajemen-pengguna",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#-1-manajemen-pengguna",children:"🔐 1. Manajemen Pengguna"})}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",n(r.li,{children:"Registrasi & login pengguna."}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Penyimpanan data pengguna di PostgreSQL."}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Tokenisasi session bisa dikombinasikan dengan Redis untuk performa."}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.h3,{id:"-2-manajemen-saldo",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#-2-manajemen-saldo",children:"💰 2. Manajemen Saldo"})}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",a(r.li,{children:["
",n(r.p,{children:"Setiap pengguna memiliki akun saldo di database."}),"
"]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:["
",n(r.p,{children:"Mendukung operasi:"}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Top-up"})," (menambah saldo)."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Withdraw"})," (menarik saldo)."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Transfer"})," (antar pengguna, debit & kredit dalam 1 transaksi)."]}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.h3,{id:"-3-transaksi",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#-3-transaksi",children:"📑 3. Transaksi"})}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",a(r.li,{children:["Semua aktivitas finansial dicatat di ",n(r.strong,{children:"riwayat transaksi"}),"."]}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Dukungan query transaksi per pengguna."}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Konsistensi dijaga dengan transaksi database (SQLx)."}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.h3,{id:"-4-kinerja--komunikasi",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#-4-kinerja--komunikasi",children:"⚡ 4. Kinerja & Komunikasi"})}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Client → Server"})," pakai gRPC (hemat bandwidth & cepat)."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:["Query SQL dibangun dinamis dengan ",n(r.strong,{children:"SeaQuery"}),"."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"sqlx"})," sebagai runtime query, mendukung migrasi & pooling connection."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.h3,{id:"-5-observability-monitoring--logging",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#-5-observability-monitoring--logging",children:"📊 5. Observability (Monitoring & Logging)"})}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",a(r.li,{children:["Metrik request, error, latency dikirim ke ",n(r.strong,{children:"Prometheus"}),"."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:["Log request/response dikirim ke ",n(r.strong,{children:"Loki"}),"."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:["Semua data divisualisasikan lewat ",n(r.strong,{children:"Grafana Dashboard"}),"."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.hr,{}),"
",n(r.h2,{id:"-keunggulan-proyek",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#-keunggulan-proyek",children:"🎯 Keunggulan Proyek"})}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Ringan & Cepat"})," → Rust + gRPC untuk high-performance backend."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Terukur"})," → bisa berkembang dari sederhana ke kompleks (misalnya menambahkan layanan fraud detection atau notifikasi)."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Modular"})," → pemisahan jelas antara service publik (Client) dan core bisnis (Server)."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Observability-ready"})," → bisa langsung dipantau performa & log-nya."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Cocok untuk Belajar"})," → mengajarkan konsep dasar ",n(r.strong,{children:"payment system"}),", ",n(r.strong,{children:"event-driven design"}),", dan ",n(r.strong,{children:"observability"})," dalam Rust."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.h2,{id:"arsitektur-sistem",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#arsitektur-sistem",children:"Arsitektur Sistem"})}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"Proyek ini dibagi menjadi dua layanan utama:"}),"
",a(r.ol,{children:["
",a(r.li,{children:["
",n(r.p,{children:n(r.strong,{children:"Client Service (Axum REST API)"})}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",a(r.li,{children:["Berfungsi sebagai ",n(r.strong,{children:"gerbang publik"})," untuk menerima request dari pengguna."]}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Menyediakan endpoint REST (HTTPS) agar mudah diakses oleh aplikasi web/mobile."}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Melakukan validasi input sebelum meneruskan request ke layanan internal."}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:["
",n(r.p,{children:n(r.strong,{children:"Server Service (Tonic gRPC)"})}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",a(r.li,{children:["Menangani seluruh ",n(r.strong,{children:"logika bisnis inti"}),": registrasi, top-up, transfer, withdraw, pengecekan saldo."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:["Komunikasi antar service menggunakan ",n(r.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," untuk kecepatan dan efisiensi."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:["Berinteraksi dengan ",n(r.strong,{children:"PostgreSQL"})," sebagai database persisten dan ",n(r.strong,{children:"Redis"})," sebagai cache."]}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:["
",n(r.p,{children:n(r.strong,{children:"Observability Stack"})}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Prometheus"})," untuk metrics (latency, error rate, request count)."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Loki"})," untuk logging terpusat."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Grafana"})," sebagai dashboard untuk visualisasi metrik & log."]}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.hr,{}),"
",n(r.h2,{id:"arsitektur-sistem-1",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#arsitektur-sistem-1",children:"Arsitektur Sistem"})}),"
",a(r.p,{children:["Arsitektur proyek ini dirancang dengan pendekatan ",n(r.em,{children:"microservices"}),", memisahkan antara bagian yang berhadapan dengan publik (Client) dan logika bisnis internal (Server)."]}),"
",n(r.p,{children:n(r.a,{href:"https://mermaid.live/edit#pako:eNp9UsGO2jAQ_RXLp60ElAQSQlStREFqV6LaLLCXJj04yRAsEps6cbUs8O8dk2yJNm19iB3Pe2_G8-ZEE5kC9Wmm2GFHNotIEFyljuuLiD6IrWJlpfS-0iqiddysxefwLpBllSlYPy0__LhF5izZQXi3gpSXb_cg0kh0xJfsyAQTZHbI-Z6VvK0_zzmIKqw3sgb1iydAPpJAxzlPyCx4IJ9idU9mL7poJTdAUGG9tWhzqYAsZYbUK20jBR6zVTD_b4WPcYkSLOY5r47t8gIlC6h2oMvwdmzV8UWxLb4tbPZWZCn3PDSfbuJnTBYGILJMI4X0-_fnr5tNsCYr-KmhrM5NV2p00xqDMu_Avuf5uWlAjWi6YBDoEXnSoI5ndK4TvVpGHg_luXavBnTSfINK8QRBtyd3pP6JaemgDwgwPejQ34ea_l1jTf3vhf8CMXzaw6nmKfW3LC-hRwtQBTP_9GR4EUWJAiLq4zFlam_cvSDpwMR3KQvq49AjTUmd7f6I6EPKKlhwhgNyg6CFoOZSi4r6tu1cNah_oi_U74-mA2dij23Lmw7dqTXq0SPejscDxxm7jucOLc9zRiP30qOv17TWwPasoTeZOK7luFPbGl9-A1xgJ0c",children:n(r.img,{src:"https://mermaid.ink/img/pako:eNp9UsGO2jAQ_RXLp60ElAQSQlStREFqV6LaLLCXJj04yRAsEps6cbUs8O8dk2yJNm19iB3Pe2_G8-ZEE5kC9Wmm2GFHNotIEFyljuuLiD6IrWJlpfS-0iqiddysxefwLpBllSlYPy0__LhF5izZQXi3gpSXb_cg0kh0xJfsyAQTZHbI-Z6VvK0_zzmIKqw3sgb1iydAPpJAxzlPyCx4IJ9idU9mL7poJTdAUGG9tWhzqYAsZYbUK20jBR6zVTD_b4WPcYkSLOY5r47t8gIlC6h2oMvwdmzV8UWxLb4tbPZWZCn3PDSfbuJnTBYGILJMI4X0-_fnr5tNsCYr-KmhrM5NV2p00xqDMu_Avuf5uWlAjWi6YBDoEXnSoI5ndK4TvVpGHg_luXavBnTSfINK8QRBtyd3pP6JaemgDwgwPejQ34ea_l1jTf3vhf8CMXzaw6nmKfW3LC-hRwtQBTP_9GR4EUWJAiLq4zFlam_cvSDpwMR3KQvq49AjTUmd7f6I6EPKKlhwhgNyg6CFoOZSi4r6tu1cNah_oi_U74-mA2dij23Lmw7dqTXq0SPejscDxxm7jucOLc9zRiP30qOv17TWwPasoTeZOK7luFPbGl9-A1xgJ0c?type=png",alt:""})})}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Pengguna"}),": Mengirim permintaan (misalnya, registrasi, transfer, top-up) melalui REST API ke ",n(r.code,{children:"Client Service"}),"."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Client Service (Axum)"}),": Menerima permintaan HTTP, melakukan validasi awal, dan meneruskannya ke ",n(r.code,{children:"Server Service"})," melalui panggilan gRPC."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Server Service (Tonic)"}),": Menerima panggilan gRPC, memproses seluruh logika bisnis, berinteraksi dengan database (PostgreSQL) dan cache (Redis), lalu mengembalikan hasilnya."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Database (PostgreSQL)"}),": Menyimpan data persisten seperti informasi pengguna, saldo, dan riwayat transaksi."]}),"

title: Payment Gateway with Echo and gRPC
excerpt: A system that simulates a payment gateway handling transactions like card payments, top-ups, withdrawals, and transfers.
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:r}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(t){const i={a:"a",code:"code",figure:"figure",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",h4:"h4",hr:"hr",img:"img",li:"li",ol:"ol",p:"p",pre:"pre",span:"span",strong:"strong",table:"table",tbody:"tbody",td:"td",th:"th",thead:"thead",tr:"tr",ul:"ul",...t.components};return r(e,{children:[n(i.h1,{id:"payment-gateway-grpc-project",children:n(i.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#payment-gateway-grpc-project",children:"Payment Gateway gRPC Project"})}),"
",r(i.p,{children:["This project is a ",n(i.strong,{children:"simple payment system implementation"})," designed to mimic the workflow of a typical digital financial service. The system is built with a modular approach, where each service can operate independently but remains interconnected through a consistent database and API."]}),"
",n(i.h3,{id:"core-features",children:n(i.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#core-features",children:"Core Features"})}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"The key components that form the core of this project include:"}),"
",r(i.ul,{children:["
",r(i.li,{children:["
",r(i.p,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"🔐 User Authentication"}),"
Supports new account registration, login with credentials, and JWT token issuance and validation. The system also includes refresh token management to maintain user session security."]}),"
"]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["
",r(i.p,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"💳 Card Management"}),"
Each user can add cards to their account. Card details such as number, card type, expiration date, and CVV are stored securely and can be accessed for transactions."]}),"
"]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["
",r(i.p,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"🏬 Merchant Management"}),"
Merchants can be created and managed through the system. Each merchant has a unique identity in the form of a UUID merchant number and an API key used to process transactions."]}),"
"]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["
",r(i.p,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"💸 Transactions"}),"
Handles the payment process between a user's card and a merchant. Each transaction is recorded with a unique number, payment amount, and information about the receiving merchant."]}),"
"]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["
",r(i.p,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"🔄 Fund Transfers"}),"
Allows users to transfer balances between cards. The system records the source (from) and destination (to) of the transfer, ensuring sufficient balance before processing the transaction."]}),"
"]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["
",r(i.p,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"📈 Balance Top-Up"}),"
Users can add funds to their cards through a top-up process. Each top-up has a unique identity and automatically updates the respective card's balance."]}),"
"]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["
",r(i.p,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"🏧 Withdrawals"}),"
Users can withdraw funds from their cards. Like top-ups, this process is recorded, and the balance is updated according to the withdrawal amount."]}),"
"]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["
",r(i.p,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"💰 Balance Management"}),"
All cards are linked to a balance entity. The system is responsible for tracking, adding, and subtracting balances consistently after every financial operation (transaction, transfer, top-up, or withdrawal)."]}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"

title: PIERO Master Orchestration Agent
excerpt: The core runtime daemon responsible for host-level security orchestration, dynamic eBPF driver injection, PID self-immunity enforcement, and real-time cognitive system intelligence analysis.

items.title: 2. Kernel Memory Hygiene & eBPF Recovery Layer

body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:i}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(r){const a={a:"a",code:"code",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",hr:"hr",li:"li",p:"p",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...r.components};return i(e,{children:[n(a.h1,{id:"piero-master-orchestration-agent",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#piero-master-orchestration-agent",children:"PIERO Master Orchestration Agent"})}),"
",i(a.p,{children:["PIERO Master Orchestration Agent (",n(a.code,{children:"piero-agent"}),") serves as the fundamental runtime core daemon and security anchor for the entire PIERO LOKA architecture stack."]}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"As a frontline execution engine, the agent operates as a high-performance binary responsible for managing host kernel privileges, dynamically injecting more than 32 eBPF/XDP sensor drivers, and synthesizing multi-vector decision logic in real time. This design enables a low-level active defense system with strong isolation guarantees and self-protection capabilities."}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"core-mechanisms--feature-breakdown",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#core-mechanisms--feature-breakdown",children:"Core Mechanisms & Feature Breakdown"})}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"1-self-immunity-protection-cache",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#1-self-immunity-protection-cache",children:"1. Self-Immunity Protection Cache"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"Prevents self-inflicted failures where the security agent could inadvertently block or interfere with its own execution (feedback loop protection)."}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Bootstrapped PID Locking"}),": The agent initializes by securing its own process identifier (PID) before loading any kernel-level sensors."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Dynamic Allowlist Registry"}),": Automatically registers the daemon PID, active threads, and parent process IDs into an eBPF kernel-level immunity map, ensuring internal traffic bypasses enforcement rules safely."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Self-Protection Isolation Layer"}),": Guarantees that internal telemetry and control flows remain unaffected by security filters."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"2-kernel-memory-hygiene--ebpf-recovery-layer",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#2-kernel-memory-hygiene--ebpf-recovery-layer",children:"2. Kernel Memory Hygiene & eBPF Recovery Layer"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"Maintains host stability by cleaning residual state from previous or corrupted runtime sessions."}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Kernel State Reconciliation"}),": Executes full map-clear routines during bootstrap to ensure clean enforcement tables inside the kernel space."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"XDP Attachment Cleanup"}),": Detects and safely detaches stale XDP programs from network interfaces before deploying new high-performance packet processing pipelines."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Runtime Consistency Enforcement"}),": Prevents accumulation of orphaned kernel hooks that could degrade system performance or stability."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"3-multi-vector-cognitive-decision-backbone",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#3-multi-vector-cognitive-decision-backbone",children:"3. Multi-Vector Cognitive Decision Backbone"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"The orchestration layer fuses multiple analytical models to derive precise security decisions in real time."}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"OPA/Rego Policy Engine"}),": Evaluates dynamic compliance rules using declarative policy definitions for runtime enforcement decisions."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Behavioral Deviation Profiler"}),": Detects anomalous binary execution patterns using ultra-fast LRU-based behavioral caching mechanisms."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Trust Decay System"}),": Applies atomic trust score degradation every 10 seconds, ensuring risk scores naturally decay when anomalous behavior subsides."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"4-software-supply-chain-audit-sbom--osv",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#4-software-supply-chain-audit-sbom--osv",children:"4. Software Supply Chain Audit (SBOM & OSV)"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"Provides continuous visibility into software integrity and dependency vulnerability exposure."}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"SBOM Generation Pipeline"}),": Periodically constructs a complete Software Bill of Materials in SPDX JSON format covering all host dependencies."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Continuous OSV Scanning"}),": Matches package fingerprints against Open Source Vulnerabilities (OSV) databases to detect outdated or vulnerable libraries in real time."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Dependency Risk Tracking"}),": Maintains a live security posture map of all runtime components."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"technology-stack",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#technology-stack",children:"Technology Stack"})}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Programming Language"}),": Rust (Edition 2024) with memory-safe systems design"]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Kernel Instrumentation"}),": eBPF & XDP high-performance packet processing drivers"]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Policy Engine"}),": Open Policy Agent (OPA) with Rego policy language"]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Communication Protocol"}),": Low-latency gRPC telemetry synchronization"]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"System Integration"}),": systemd watchdog for high-availability daemon supervision"]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"operational-dashboard",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#operational-dashboard",children:"Operational Dashboard"})}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"piero-agent-control-interface",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#piero-agent-control-interface",children:"PIERO Agent Control Interface"})}),"
",n("img",{src:"/portofolio/PieroLokaRust/PieroAgent.png",alt:"PIERO Master Agent Dashboard"})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:i}=e.components||{};return i?n(i,{...e,children:n(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};

title: PIERO Cloud Provider Emulator
excerpt: A high-fidelity offline cloud infrastructure simulation engine supporting JSON/CBOR/query protocol parsing for enforcing distributed transaction workflows and security operations testing.

items.title: 3. High-Performance Memory Store & Persistent State Engine

body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:i}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(r){const t={a:"a",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",hr:"hr",li:"li",p:"p",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...r.components};return i(e,{children:[n(t.h1,{id:"piero-cloud-provider-emulator",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#piero-cloud-provider-emulator",children:"PIERO Cloud Provider Emulator"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"PIERO Cloud Provider Emulator is a high-fidelity cloud infrastructure simulation engine that operates entirely in an offline local environment."}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"It is designed to validate cross-plane enforcement workflows and distributed transaction sagas, enabling comprehensive testing of security mitigation actions—such as emergency IAM token revocation, encryption key suspension, or storage volume snapshotting—without requiring interaction with any public cloud provider."}),"
",n(t.hr,{}),"
",n(t.h2,{id:"core-features--technical-capabilities",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#core-features--technical-capabilities",children:"Core Features & Technical Capabilities"})}),"
",n(t.h3,{id:"1-polyglot-cloud-protocol-decoder",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#1-polyglot-cloud-protocol-decoder",children:"1. Polyglot Cloud Protocol Decoder"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"To ensure full compatibility with modern cloud SDKs and legacy interfaces, the emulator includes a multi-protocol decoding system."}),"
",i(t.ul,{children:["
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Query Protocol Decoder"}),": Parses legacy XML-based queries and form-encoded POST requests commonly used in older authentication systems."]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"REST JSON Decoder"}),": Efficiently processes modern RESTful API payloads with structured JSON schemas."]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Binary CBOR Decoder"}),": Supports Concise Binary Object Representation for high-performance binary serialization and compact cloud-native communication formats."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(t.hr,{}),"
",n(t.h3,{id:"2-local-security-mitigation-simulation-layer",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#2-local-security-mitigation-simulation-layer",children:"2. Local Security Mitigation Simulation Layer"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"The system mirrors real-world cloud provider mitigation behaviors for controlled testing and validation."}),"
",i(t.ul,{children:["
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Identity Management Simulation"}),": Emulates immediate revocation of compromised session credentials at the authorization layer."]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Compute Isolation Emulation"}),": Simulates workload isolation actions such as VM containment, container shutdown, and orchestration-level service segmentation."]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Resource Suspension Modeling"}),": Tests behaviors such as cryptographic key suspension and distributed storage bucket lockdown scenarios."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(t.hr,{}),"
",n(t.h3,{id:"3-high-performance-memory-store--persistent-state-engine",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#3-high-performance-memory-store--persistent-state-engine",children:"3. High-Performance Memory Store & Persistent State Engine"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"The emulator maintains a fast in-memory state system with deterministic persistence guarantees."}),"
",i(t.ul,{children:["
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Atomic State Synchronization"}),": Every simulated infrastructure change is immediately reflected in an in-memory atomic state graph."]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Automated Snapshot Persistence"}),": Periodic disk snapshots ensure durability of simulated cloud state across runtime restarts."]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Low-Latency State Queries"}),": Optimized for fast inspection of large-scale simulated infrastructure graphs."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(t.hr,{}),"
",n(t.h3,{id:"4-synthetic-telemetry-generation-engine",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#4-synthetic-telemetry-generation-engine",children:"4. Synthetic Telemetry Generation Engine"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"Provides continuous traffic simulation for observability and performance testing."}),"
",i(t.ul,{children:["
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Automated Heartbeat Streams"}),": Generates synthetic API traffic across multiple simulated cloud services."]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Scheduled Telemetry Emission"}),": Produces continuous event streams compatible with SPIFFE-based identity tagging and telemetry collectors."]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Load Simulation Framework"}),": Enables realistic stress testing of distributed transaction and enforcement pipelines."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(t.hr,{}),"
",n(t.h2,{id:"technology-stack",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#technology-stack",children:"Technology Stack"})}),"
",i(t.ul,{children:["
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Programming Language"}),": Rust (Edition 2024) with focus on safe concurrency and performance"]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Serialization Formats"}),": CBOR, JSON, XML"]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Runtime Architecture"}),": Tokio-based asynchronous execution engine"]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Communication Model"}),": Internal telemetry streaming and event-driven API simulation"]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Design Goal"}),": High-fidelity offline cloud behavior replication"]}),"
"]}),"

title: PIERO GPUI Database Management Utility
excerpt: A GPU-accelerated desktop database administration interface for automated backups, relational data dumping, and FIFO-based retention lifecycle management.
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:a}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(i){const r={a:"a",code:"code",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",hr:"hr",li:"li",p:"p",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...i.components};return a(e,{children:[n(r.h1,{id:"piero-unified-database-management-utility",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#piero-unified-database-management-utility",children:"PIERO Unified Database Management Utility"})}),"
",a(r.p,{children:["PIERO Database Management Utility (",n(r.code,{children:"piero-db-mgmt"}),") serves as a premium desktop-grade database administration console designed to unify storage lifecycle management across the PIERO LOKA ecosystem."]}),"
",a(r.p,{children:["Built entirely with ",n(r.strong,{children:"Zed GPUI"}),", the system leverages full GPU acceleration to deliver a browserless, high-performance management interface. It enables fast execution of scheduled backups, large-scale relational data dumping, and real-time storage retention control without the overhead of traditional web-based database dashboards."]}),"
",n(r.hr,{}),"
",n(r.h2,{id:"core-features--architecture",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#core-features--architecture",children:"Core Features & Architecture"})}),"

",n(r.p,{children:"The interface is designed for ultra-low-latency rendering of complex database operations and system state visualization."}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"GPU Vector Rendering Engine"}),": All UI elements—including connection grids, backup timelines, and schema visualizations—are rendered directly using GPU primitives."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Zero-Latency Interaction Model"}),": Ensures smooth UI responsiveness even during large-scale data transfers and background backup operations."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"High-Frequency State Updates"}),": Real-time synchronization of database health metrics and job execution status."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.hr,{}),"
",n(r.h3,{id:"2-polyglot-database-engine-adapters",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#2-polyglot-database-engine-adapters",children:"2. Polyglot Database Engine Adapters"})}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"Provides unified integration across multiple storage backends with consistent operational semantics."}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"SQLite3 Integration"}),": Atomic local file-based snapshots with safe locking mechanisms for concurrent access prevention."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"PostgreSQL / MySQL Support"}),": Distributed dump orchestration over secure TCP connections with structured backup pipelines."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Redis & Key-Value Stores"}),": Non-blocking memory snapshot operations without interrupting active read/write workloads."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Extensible Adapter Layer"}),": Designed for future integration with additional relational and NoSQL systems."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.hr,{}),"
",n(r.h3,{id:"3-fifo-retention--disk-lifecycle-engine",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#3-fifo-retention--disk-lifecycle-engine",children:"3. FIFO Retention & Disk Lifecycle Engine"})}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"Prevents uncontrolled storage growth through deterministic retention policies."}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Capacity Enforcement Layer"}),": Enforces strict storage quotas per database and backup category."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Deterministic Garbage Collection"}),": Automatically removes the oldest backup artifacts when storage thresholds are exceeded."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Chronological Retention Model"}),": Ensures predictable FIFO-based lifecycle management for archival data."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.hr,{}),"
",n(r.h3,{id:"4-asynchronous-background-job-scheduler",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#4-asynchronous-background-job-scheduler",children:"4. Asynchronous Background Job Scheduler"})}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"Automates database maintenance workflows while preserving UI responsiveness."}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Cron-Based Scheduling Engine"}),": Supports precise periodic execution of backup and maintenance tasks (e.g., every 4 hours)."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Non-Blocking Worker Runtime"}),": Executes compression, export, and archival pipelines in isolated asynchronous worker threads."]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Job Isolation Model"}),": Ensures background workloads do not interfere with interactive database operations."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.hr,{}),"
",n(r.h2,{id:"technology-stack",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#technology-stack",children:"Technology Stack"})}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Programming Language"}),": Rust (Edition 2024)"]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"UI Framework"}),": Zed GPUI GPU-accelerated rendering engine"]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Concurrency Runtime"}),": Tokio asynchronous task system"]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Storage Adapters"}),": PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, Redis, MongoDB"]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Architecture Pattern"}),": Event-driven async job orchestration with GPU-native visualization"]}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.hr,{}),"

title: PIERO Edge LLM Reasoning Engine
excerpt: A high-performance edge AI reasoning server that isolates small language models (SLMs) through cryptographic verification, strict CPU budget enforcement, and deterministic output sanitization.
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:i}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(r){const t={a:"a",code:"code",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",hr:"hr",li:"li",p:"p",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...r.components};return i(e,{children:[n(t.h1,{id:"piero-edge-llm-reasoning-engine",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#piero-edge-llm-reasoning-engine",children:"PIERO Edge LLM Reasoning Engine"})}),"
",i(t.p,{children:["PIERO Edge LLM Reasoning Engine (",n(t.code,{children:"piero-llm"}),") operates as a high-performance secondary reasoning server dedicated to enabling intelligent cognitive computation across the PIERO LOKA ecosystem."]}),"
",i(t.p,{children:["Designed to run ",n(t.strong,{children:"Small Language Models (SLMs)"})," efficiently on edge hardware, the module enforces a strict trust boundary around AI inference execution. It ensures model integrity through cryptographic verification, applies precise CPU budget scheduling, and enforces deterministic output sanitization so that AI-generated decisions remain tamper-resistant, resource-aware, and safe for downstream policy systems."]}),"
",n(t.hr,{}),"
",n(t.h2,{id:"core-capabilities--ai-safety-architecture",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#core-capabilities--ai-safety-architecture",children:"Core Capabilities & AI Safety Architecture"})}),"
",n(t.h3,{id:"1-cryptographic-model-trust-verification-modelguard",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#1-cryptographic-model-trust-verification-modelguard",children:"1. Cryptographic Model Trust Verification (ModelGuard)"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"Ensures that AI model weights and binaries have not been tampered with or corrupted before inference begins."}),"
",i(t.ul,{children:["
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Strict Hash Verification"}),": Validates model integrity using SHA-256 fingerprint matching prior to loading weights into runtime memory."]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Signature Enforcement Layer"}),": Rejects any model that fails integrity verification, preventing execution of modified or compromised artifacts."]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Secure Model Loading Pipeline"}),": Guarantees that only trusted, verified models can participate in inference workflows."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(t.hr,{}),"
",n(t.h3,{id:"2-dynamic-cpu-budget-enforcement-zero-impact-scheduling",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#2-dynamic-cpu-budget-enforcement-zero-impact-scheduling",children:"2. Dynamic CPU Budget Enforcement (Zero-Impact Scheduling)"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"Maintains system stability by preventing inference workloads from degrading critical runtime services."}),"
",i(t.ul,{children:["
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"CPU Budget Controller"}),": Continuously monitors host CPU utilization and throttles inference execution when system load exceeds safety thresholds."]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Adaptive Scheduling Layer"}),": Dynamically delays or queues inference requests to maintain predictable system performance under load."]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"LlmGate Fast Path Optimization"}),": Skips full model execution when heuristic confidence is already sufficiently high (e.g., >90%), significantly reducing compute overhead."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(t.hr,{}),"

title: PIERO Purple Team Engine
