title: PIERO LOKA - Kernel-Level Security & FinOps
excerpt: Platform pemantauan keamanan dan FinOps performa tinggi berbasis eBPF dengan arsitektur Core Dispatcher untuk visibilitas kernel mendalam.

items.title: 1. Real-Time FinOps and Distributed Cost Attribution

body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:i}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(r){const a={a:"a",code:"code",figure:"figure",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",h4:"h4",hr:"hr",li:"li",p:"p",pre:"pre",span:"span",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...r.components};return i(e,{children:[n(a.h1,{id:"piero-loka",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#piero-loka",children:"PIERO LOKA"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:n(a.strong,{children:"Kernel-Level Security, FinOps, and Deep Observability via eBPF — Refactored"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"PIERO LOKA is a high-performance security and FinOps observability platform built with Go and eBPF. The system operates directly at the kernel level, providing high-fidelity system visibility with extremely low overhead (under 1.5%)."}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"consolidated-architecture-update",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#consolidated-architecture-update",children:"Consolidated Architecture Update"})}),"
",i(a.p,{children:["The latest architecture introduces a ",n(a.strong,{children:"Core Dispatcher"})," pattern that consolidates more than 28 kernel hooks into 6 high-performance kernel entry points. Using a zero-copy ring buffer design and internal event correlation, kernel overhead and context switching have been reduced by 60%–75%."]}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"core-dispatcher-capabilities",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#core-dispatcher-capabilities",children:"Core Dispatcher Capabilities"})}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Unified Entry Points"}),": Reduces processing overhead by routing data through only 6 core kernel hooks."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Smart Event Correlation"}),": Eliminates duplicate and overlapping events across modules to reduce alert fatigue."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Intelligent Module Masking"}),": Dynamically routes telemetry only to relevant security modules based on runtime context."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Business Context Enrichment"}),": Augments raw kernel signals with Kubernetes-aware metadata for immediate operational actionability."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"functional-domains-and-core-capabilities",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#functional-domains-and-core-capabilities",children:"Functional Domains and Core Capabilities"})}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"1-real-time-finops-and-distributed-cost-attribution",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#1-real-time-finops-and-distributed-cost-attribution",children:"1. Real-Time FinOps and Distributed Cost Attribution"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"Performs cost attribution directly at kernel level for high-precision resource accounting:"}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",i(a.li,{children:["
",n(a.p,{children:n(a.strong,{children:"Accurate Cost Metrics"})}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"CPU"}),": Tracks nanosecond-level CPU consumption per process via ",n(a.code,{children:"sched_switch"})," events."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Memory"}),": Monitors active virtual memory footprint through syscall-level allocations (",n(a.code,{children:"mmap"}),", ",n(a.code,{children:"munmap"}),")."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Network"}),": Maps RX/TX traffic directly to cloud egress cost estimation models."]}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:["
",i(a.p,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Workload Attribution"}),": Correlates Process IDs (PIDs) with Kubernetes context (namespace, pod, and service identity)."]}),"
"]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:["
",i(a.p,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Spending Spike Detection"}),": Uses a 60-second sliding window to detect anomalous compute cost surges."]}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"2-advanced-security-and-threat-detection",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#2-advanced-security-and-threat-detection",children:"2. Advanced Security and Threat Detection"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"Proactive protection powered by 28 specialized eBPF modules covering more than 130 detection patterns mapped to the MITRE ATT&CK framework."}),"
",n(a.h4,{id:"security-module-coverage",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#security-module-coverage",children:"Security Module Coverage"})}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Core Kernel Security Modules"}),": Runtime protection covering memory allocation, suspicious network activity, privilege escalation attempts (cgroup escapes), syscall monitoring, and process execution control."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Advanced Security Modules"}),": Detection of authentication exploits (PAM & sudo abuse), cryptographic integrity violations, hardware tampering (EFI/DMA attacks), TTY session attacks, GPU workload isolation, AI/ML data poisoning prevention, and Kubernetes/service mesh bypass attempts (Istio/Envoy)."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Self-Integrity Protection"}),": Defends the platform against kernel rootkits, unauthorized eBPF program replacement, and syscall table manipulation."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Observability & Compliance"}),": Produces forensic-grade audit trails for compliance requirements, including sensitive data loss prevention (DLP) for secrets such as AWS keys and PII, as well as GDPR-aligned auditing."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"technology-stack",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#technology-stack",children:"Technology Stack"})}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Backend Language"}),": Go (Golang) 1.24+"]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Kernel Instrumentation"}),": eBPF (CO-RE via ",n(a.code,{children:"cilium/ebpf"}),") for portable kernel-level instrumentation."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Frontend Console"}),": React (TypeScript) + Vite for lightweight real-time dashboards."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Detection Engine"}),": 130+ detection patterns mapped to MITRE ATT&CK."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"System Efficiency"}),": Sustains under 1.5% system overhead using kernel-side LRU caching optimizations."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"getting-started",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#getting-started",children:"Getting Started"})}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"system-requirements",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#system-requirements",children:"System Requirements"})}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",n(a.li,{children:"Linux kernel version 5.8 or higher"}),"
",i(a.li,{children:["Tooling: ",n(a.code,{children:"clang"}),", ",n(a.code,{children:"llvm"}),", ",n(a.code,{children:"libbpf-dev"}),", Go compiler (1.21+)"]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"module-configuration",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#module-configuration",children:"Module Configuration"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"The platform supports flexible module loading depending on operational needs:"}),"
",n(a.figure,{"data-rehype-pretty-code-figure":"",children:n(a.pre,{style:{backgroundColor:"#1E1E1E",color:"#D4D4D4"},tabIndex:"0","data-language":"bash","data-theme":"dark-plus",children:i(a.code,{"data-language":"bash","data-theme":"dark-plus",style:{display:"grid"},children:[n(a.span,{"data-line":"",children:n(a.span,{style:{color:"#6A9955"},children:"# Run baseline security protection modules"})}),"
",i(a.span,{"data-line":"",children:[n(a.span,{style:{color:"#DCDCAA"},children:"sudo"}),n(a.span,{style:{color:"#CE9178"},children:" go"}),n(a.span,{style:{color:"#CE9178"},children:" run"}),n(a.span,{style:{color:"#CE9178"},children:" ./cmd/agent/main.go"}),n(a.span,{style:{color:"#569CD6"},children:" --modules=privilege,process,network,io,supply,auth,container,dlp"})]}),"
",n(a.span,{"data-line":"",children:" "}),"
",n(a.span,{"data-line":"",children:n(a.span,{style:{color:"#6A9955"},children:"# Run FinOps and performance monitoring only"})}),"
",i(a.span,{"data-line":"",children:[n(a.span,{style:{color:"#DCDCAA"},children:"sudo"}),n(a.span,{style:{color:"#CE9178"},children:" go"}),n(a.span,{style:{color:"#CE9178"},children:" run"}),n(a.span,{style:{color:"#CE9178"},children:" ./cmd/agent/main.go"}),n(a.span,{style:{color:"#569CD6"},children:" --modules=profiler,sla,finops,scheduler"})]}),"
",n(a.span,{"data-line":"",children:" "}),"
",n(a.span,{"data-line":"",children:n(a.span,{style:{color:"#6A9955"},children:"# Load all modules"})}),"
",i(a.span,{"data-line":"",children:[n(a.span,{style:{color:"#DCDCAA"},children:"sudo"}),n(a.span,{style:{color:"#CE9178"},children:" go"}),n(a.span,{style:{color:"#CE9178"},children:" run"}),n(a.span,{style:{color:"#CE9178"},children:" ./cmd/agent/main.go"}),n(a.span,{style:{color:"#569CD6"},children:" --modules=all"})]})]})})}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"observability-dashboard-insights",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#observability-dashboard-insights",children:"Observability Dashboard Insights"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"The PIERO LOKA interactive dashboard aggregates real-time system intelligence:"}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Correlated Threat Feed"}),": Displays linked attack chains mapped to MITRE ATT&CK techniques."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"FinOps Analytics"}),": Granular visualization of cost per Kubernetes namespace and pod."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Container Visibility"}),": Tracks full container lifecycle from initialization to termination."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"dashboard-visualizations",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#dashboard-visualizations",children:"Dashboard Visualizations"})}),"
",n(a.h4,{id:"piero-loka-dashboard",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#piero-loka-dashboard",children:"PIERO LOKA Dashboard"})}),"
",n("img",{src:"/portofolio/pierolokaGo_0.0.2/pieroloka_dashboard.png",alt:"PIERO LOKA Dashboard"}),"
",n(a.h4,{id:"docker-runtime-dashboard",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#docker-runtime-dashboard",children:"Docker Runtime Dashboard"})}),"
",n("img",{src:"/portofolio/pierolokaGo_0.0.2/pieroloka_docker_running.png",alt:"PIERO LOKA Docker Dashboard"}),"
",n(a.h4,{id:"container-logs",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#container-logs",children:"Container Logs"})}),"
",n("img",{src:"/portofolio/pierolokaGo_0.0.2/pieroloka_logs_docker.png",alt:"PIERO LOKA Docker Logs"})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:i}=e.components||{};return i?n(i,{...e,children:n(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};

title: Point of sale GRPC
excerpt: A Point of sale example using Go, Sqlc, and Docker Compose.
body:
const{Fragment:a,jsx:n,jsxs:e}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(i){const r={a:"a",code:"code",figure:"figure",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",hr:"hr",img:"img",li:"li",ol:"ol",p:"p",pre:"pre",span:"span",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...i.components};return e(a,{children:[n(r.h1,{id:"-proyek-point-of-sale-pos-grpc",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#-proyek-point-of-sale-pos-grpc",children:"💳 Proyek Point of Sale (POS) gRPC"})}),"
",e(r.p,{children:["Proyek ini merupakan ",n(r.strong,{children:"implementasi backend untuk sistem Point of Sale (POS)"})," yang dirancang dengan arsitektur ",n(r.strong,{children:"monolitik terstruktur"}),". Meskipun monolitik, proyek ini disusun dengan modul-modul yang jelas sehingga setiap domain (misalnya pengguna, merchant, inventaris, dan transaksi) tetap mudah dikelola serta memungkinkan pengembangan lebih lanjut tanpa kehilangan keteraturan."]}),"
",e(r.p,{children:["Tujuan utama dari proyek ini adalah untuk menghadirkan ",n(r.strong,{children:"fondasi kuat, aman, dan skalabel"})," bagi aplikasi kasir modern yang digunakan oleh berbagai jenis bisnis ritel. Dengan desain yang terstruktur, sistem mampu menangani kebutuhan kasir sehari-hari mulai dari pengelolaan pengguna, inventaris, hingga pencatatan transaksi penjualan, sambil tetap mudah di-deploy di berbagai lingkungan."]}),"
",e(r.p,{children:["Komunikasi antara klien dengan server dilakukan melalui ",n(r.strong,{children:"REST API"}),", sementara komunikasi internal antara API Gateway dan layanan utama menggunakan ",n(r.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," dengan ",n(r.strong,{children:"Protobuf"}),". Hal ini memastikan sistem memiliki ",n(r.strong,{children:"latensi rendah dan throughput tinggi"}),", sehingga tetap responsif meskipun menangani transaksi dalam jumlah besar. Data transaksi dan manajemen entitas disimpan dengan aman di dalam ",n(r.strong,{children:"PostgreSQL"}),", yang dikenal stabil dan handal untuk kebutuhan finansial serta operasional."]}),"
",n(r.h3,{id:"lingkup-dan-fungsi-utama",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#lingkup-dan-fungsi-utama",children:"Lingkup dan Fungsi Utama"})}),"
",e(r.ul,{children:["
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"🔐 Manajemen Pengguna & Peran"}),"
Sistem mendukung otentikasi dan otorisasi dengan level akses berbeda (admin, pemilik merchant, kasir). Hal ini memastikan hanya pihak berwenang yang dapat melakukan aksi tertentu sesuai tanggung jawabnya."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"🏬 Manajemen Merchant"}),"
Pemilik bisnis dapat mendaftarkan toko/merchant, mengatur informasi penting seperti nama toko, API key, hingga struktur operasional yang mereka miliki."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"👨‍💼 Manajemen Kasir"}),"
Merchant dapat menambahkan akun kasir, memberikan akses sesuai kebutuhan, serta memantau aktivitas kasir mereka secara langsung."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"📦 Manajemen Inventaris"}),"
Mendukung CRUD penuh terhadap produk dan kategori, mencakup detail stok, harga, deskripsi, hingga kategori produk. Dengan sistem ini, stok selalu up-to-date dan bisa dikontrol secara efisien."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"💳 Proses Transaksi"}),"
Sistem menyediakan alur lengkap untuk membuat pesanan, menambahkan item ke keranjang, menghitung total pembayaran, hingga mencatat transaksi secara permanen di database."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"⚡ Komunikasi gRPC Internal"}),"
API Gateway berkomunikasi dengan server utama melalui gRPC, yang memberikan performa tinggi serta mempermudah scaling di masa depan jika sistem ingin dipecah menjadi microservices."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"📖 Dokumentasi API Otomatis"}),"
REST API secara otomatis terdokumentasi dengan Swagger (",n(r.strong,{children:"Swago"}),"), sehingga memudahkan developer maupun tim integrasi untuk memahami dan menguji endpoint yang tersedia."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"🐳 Kontainerisasi dengan Docker"}),"
Sistem siap dijalankan pada lingkungan terisolasi dengan Docker & Docker Compose, membuat proses setup menjadi cepat, konsisten, dan mudah di-deploy di berbagai platform."]}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.hr,{}),"
",n(r.h2,{id:"-tech-teknologi",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#-tech-teknologi",children:"🧰 Tech Teknologi"})}),"
",e(r.ul,{children:["
",e(r.li,{children:["🐹 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Go (Golang)"})," — Bahasa implementasi."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🌐 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Echo"})," — Kerangka kerja web minimalis untuk membangun REST API."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🪵 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Zap Logger"})," — Pencatatan terstruktur untuk aplikasi berkinerja tinggi."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["📦 ",n(r.strong,{children:"SQLC"})," — Menghasilkan kode Go yang aman dari tipe dari kueri SQL."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🚀 ",n(r.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," — RPC berkinerja tinggi untuk komunikasi layanan internal."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🧳 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Goose"})," — Alat migrasi untuk mengelola perubahan skema database."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🐳 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Docker"})," — Platform kontainerisasi untuk lingkungan pengembangan yang konsisten."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["📄 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Swago"})," — Menghasilkan dokumentasi Swagger 2.0 untuk rute Echo."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🔗 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Docker Compose"})," — Mengelola aplikasi Docker multi-kontainer."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.hr,{}),"
",n(r.h2,{id:"arsitektur",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#arsitektur",children:"Arsitektur"})}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"Aplikasi ini dirancang dengan arsitektur berorientasi layanan monolith (monolith). REST API yang menghadap klien bertindak sebagai gateway, menerjemahkan permintaan HTTP menjadi panggilan gRPC ke server backend. Server ini berisi logika bisnis inti dan berkomunikasi dengan database PostgreSQL."}),"
",n(r.p,{children:n(r.a,{href:"https://mermaid.live/edit#pako:eNqdUl1vmzAU_SuWI02pRNIAgRg_TKqaaevWrazJ00IeLuGGoICNjGmbRfnvMx9ZO1WbtNqS4R7fe865to90IxOknKYKyh1ZziNBzKjquAMieiM0KthXGQlRpGktIKJdUjPOGBmNTO6n5TK8vP-wWJLh58Xdt4uIGvw9-ZJnKFbtenkV3pCPoPERDuuOBkUSiVeyt3AAAYJclXm2hyp7KdoydYrpfXhNhqGSWsb19iy4QPWAatV9SJOzfq7u0bZ88f22L5mDhhgqXA1DWelUodm6-KfDpnUsYhCpsfmO3JXmmP70-TVLG2hl7FVYncP136Rfi-lDjn232yzP-SBxmR_EVqWV3CMfuBuXuX4fjh6zRO-4Uz5ZG5lLxQcOa-ZLrr73joy54AXs7WRn3z1dzOLY8d9O1x9Pz7ZFNrGD_2OjlnnGWUL5FvIKLVqgKqCJ6bERiqjeYYER5eY3AbVv7upkikoQP6QsKNeqNmVK1unuN0ldJua5zjMw7p5TzC2hupa10JTbbktB-ZE-UT5yg7E3c6aOzYKJHzSbB4NOp2PPm_oe8yc2Y57r-ieL_mxV7bHD7AmbzTzf9vzAsaenX5TJG5I",children:n(r.img,{src:"https://mermaid.ink/img/pako:eNqdUl1vmzAU_SuWI02pRNIAgRg_TKqaaevWrazJ00IeLuGGoICNjGmbRfnvMx9ZO1WbtNqS4R7fe865to90IxOknKYKyh1ZziNBzKjquAMieiM0KthXGQlRpGktIKJdUjPOGBmNTO6n5TK8vP-wWJLh58Xdt4uIGvw9-ZJnKFbtenkV3pCPoPERDuuOBkUSiVeyt3AAAYJclXm2hyp7KdoydYrpfXhNhqGSWsb19iy4QPWAatV9SJOzfq7u0bZ88f22L5mDhhgqXA1DWelUodm6-KfDpnUsYhCpsfmO3JXmmP70-TVLG2hl7FVYncP136Rfi-lDjn232yzP-SBxmR_EVqWV3CMfuBuXuX4fjh6zRO-4Uz5ZG5lLxQcOa-ZLrr73joy54AXs7WRn3z1dzOLY8d9O1x9Pz7ZFNrGD_2OjlnnGWUL5FvIKLVqgKqCJ6bERiqjeYYER5eY3AbVv7upkikoQP6QsKNeqNmVK1unuN0ldJua5zjMw7p5TzC2hupa10JTbbktB-ZE-UT5yg7E3c6aOzYKJHzSbB4NOp2PPm_oe8yc2Y57r-ieL_mxV7bHD7AmbzTzf9vzAsaenX5TJG5I?type=png",alt:""})})}),"

Designed around domain-driven service boundaries following Clean Architecture and CQRS principles, it retains the operational and deployment simplicity of a single deployment unit while maintaining logical isolation typical of microservices."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["Each e-commerce business domain — Users, Roles, Banners, Carts, Categories, Merchants, Merchant Awards, Merchant Businesses, Merchant Details, Merchant Policies, Orders, Order Items, Products, Reviews, Review Details, Shipping Addresses, Sliders, Transactions — lives in its own self-contained Maven module. These modules communicate synchronously via high-performance ",n(r.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," protocols and asynchronously using ",n(r.strong,{children:"Apache Kafka"})," event propagation, exposing a unified reactive entry point through a ",n(r.strong,{children:"REST API Gateway"})," powered by the Eclipse Vert.x HTTP Router."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform is fortified with a ",n(r.strong,{children:"comprehensive observability suite"})," (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Jaeger, OpenTelemetry, Pyroscope), robust connection pooling via ",n(r.strong,{children:"PgBouncer"}),", ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform implements a ",n(r.strong,{children:"Distributed Modular Monolith"})," architecture. Each business service is logical, decoupled, and self-contained inside its own Maven submodule, possessing its own independent gRPC boundary. A ",n(r.strong,{children:"Vert.x REST API Gateway"})," acts as the unified edge router, transforming client HTTP REST requests into fast gRPC downstream communications via Vert.x gRPC clients."]})," ",n(r.h3,{id:"core-architecture-principles",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#core-architecture-principles",children:"Core Architecture strictly forbidding cross-boundary database sharing."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Clean Architecture & CQRS"}),": Separation of concerns using ",n(r.code,{children:"Handler (gRPC) → Pooling"}),": Employs connection pooling to avoid PostgreSQL socket exhaustion across the multiple concurrent modular services."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Event-Driven Resilience"}),": Apache Kafka decouples transaction events, ensuring side effects like email billing remain completely non-blocking."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"OTel Telemetry title: Distributed Modular Monolith Payment Gateway - Vertx
excerpt: A Distributed Modular Monolith Payment Gateway built with Java, Vert.x, PostgreSQL, and Kafka with full observability stack.

Designed around domain-driven service boundaries following Clean Architecture and CQRS principles, it retains the operational and deployment simplicity of a single deployment unit while maintaining logical isolation typical of microservices."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["Each financial and identity business domain — Users, Roles, Cards, Merchants, Saldo, Topups, Transactions, Transfers, Withdrawals — lives in its own self-contained Maven module. These modules communicate synchronously via high-performance ",n(r.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," protocols and asynchronously using ",n(r.strong,{children:"Apache Kafka"})," event propagation, exposing a unified reactive entry point through a ",n(r.strong,{children:"REST API Gateway"})," powered by Eclipse Vert.x HTTP Router."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform is fortified with a ",n(r.strong,{children:"comprehensive observability suite"})," (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Jaeger, OpenTelemetry, Pyroscope), robust connection pooling via ",n(r.strong,{children:"PgBouncer"}),", ",n(r.strong,{children:"distributed Redis Cluster caching"})," with custom telemetry for each service, and Kubernetes configurations ready for production auto-scaling."]})," ",n(r.hr,{})," ",n(r.h2,{id:"architecture-overview",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#architecture-overview",children:"Architecture Overview"})})," ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform implements a ",n(r.strong,{children:"Distributed Modular Monolith"})," architecture. Each business service is logical, decoupled, and self-contained inside its own Maven submodule, possessing its own independent gRPC boundary. A ",n(r.strong,{children:"Vert.x REST API Gateway"})," acts as the unified edge router, transforming client HTTP REST requests into fast gRPC downstream communications via Vert.x gRPC clients."]})," ",n(r.h3,{id:"core-architecture-principles",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#core-architecture-principles",children:"Core Architecture Principles"})})," ",l(r.ul,{children:[" ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Domain-Driven Boundary Isolation"}),": Every service owns its database access, caching layers, and service logic, strictly forbidding cross-boundary database sharing."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Clean Architecture & CQRS"}),": Separation of concerns using ",n(r.code,{children:"Handler (gRPC) → Service (Command/Query) → Repository (Command/Query)"})," layers ensures business logic remains clean, performant, and framework-agnostic."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Reactive execution"}),": Powered entirely by the non-blocking Eclipse Vert.x event loop, enabling high throughput with minimal resource footprints."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"PgBouncer Pooling"}),": Employs connection pooling to avoid PostgreSQL socket exhaustion across the multiple concurrent modular services."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Event-Driven Resilience"}),": Apache Kafka decouples transaction events, ensuring side effects like email billing remain completely non-blocking."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"OTel Telemetry Integration"}),": Standardized OpenTelemetry middleware injects trace IDs across gRPC boundaries, allowing seamless trace propagation from the client REST gateway down to postgres operations."]})," title: Distributed Modular Monolith Point of Sale API
excerpt: A reactive Point of Sale (POS) REST API built with Java 17, Vert.x, PostgreSQL, Redis, and a full observability stack.

toc.title: Distributed Modular Monolith Point of Sale - Vertx

items.title: 4. Build Docker Images and Start Environment

Designed around domain-driven service boundaries following Clean Architecture and CQRS principles, it retains the operational and deployment simplicity of a single deployment unit while maintaining logical isolation typical of microservices."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["Each point of sale (POS) business domain — Users, Roles, Banners, Carts, Categories, Merchants, Merchant Awards, Merchant Businesses, Merchant Details, Merchant Policies, Orders, Order Items, Products, Reviews, Review Details, Shipping Addresses, Sliders, Transactions — lives in its own self-contained Maven module. These modules communicate synchronously via high-performance ",n(r.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," protocols and asynchronously using ",n(r.strong,{children:"Apache Kafka"})," event propagation, exposing a unified reactive entry point through a ",n(r.strong,{children:"REST API Gateway"})," powered by the Eclipse Vert.x HTTP Router."]})," ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform is fortified with a ",n(r.strong,{children:"comprehensive observability suite"})," (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Jaeger, OpenTelemetry, Pyroscope), robust connection pooling via ",n(r.strong,{children:"PgBouncer"}),", ",n(r.strong,{children:"distributed Redis Cluster caching"})," with custom telemetry for each service, and Kubernetes configurations ready for production auto-scaling."]})," ",n(r.hr,{})," (featuring a 6-node Redis Cluster and PgBouncer), and auto-scaling Kubernetes manifests configured with Horizontal Pod Autoscalers (HPA)."})]})]})]})," ",n(r.hr,{})," ",n(r.h2,{id:"architecture-overview",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#architecture-overview",children:"Architecture Overview"})})," ",l(r.p,{children:["The platform implements a ",n(r.strong,{children:"Distributed Modular Monolith"})," architecture. Each business service is logical, decoupled, and self-contained inside its own Maven submodule, possessing its own independent gRPC boundary. A ",n(r.strong,{children:"Vert.x REST API Gateway"})," acts as the unified edge router, transforming client HTTP REST requests into fast gRPC downstream communications via Vert.x gRPC clients."]})," ",n(r.h3,{id:"core-architecture-principles",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#core-architecture-principles",children:"Core Architecture Principles"})})," ",l(r.ul,{children:[" ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Domain-Driven Boundary Isolation"}),": Every service owns its database access, caching layers, and service logic, strictly forbidding cross-boundary database sharing."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Clean Architecture & CQRS"}),": Separation of concerns using ",n(r.code,{children:"Handler (gRPC) → Service (Command/Query) → Repository (Command/Query)"})," layers ensures business logic remains clean, performant, and framework-agnostic."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Reactive execution"}),": Powered entirely by the non-blocking Eclipse Vert.x event loop, enabling high throughput with minimal resource footprints."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"PgBouncer Pooling"}),": Employs connection pooling to avoid PostgreSQL socket exhaustion across the multiple concurrent modular services."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Event-Driven Resilience"}),": Apache Kafka decouples transaction events, ensuring side effects like email billing remain completely non-blocking."]})," ",l(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"OTel Telemetry Integration"}),": Standardized OpenTelemetry middleware injects trace IDs across gRPC boundaries, allowing seamless trace propagation from the client REST gateway down to postgres operations."]}),"
